note: Retrieval-ready shape for Taste Cortex / NIM embeddings and prompt assembly. Ingest prompts, assets, and decisions with these keys so the 1024-dim index supports precise agent queries for on-brand references, reroll candidates, and co-evolution signals. Declared in CONTRACTS.md as the surface for I3 cortex.

fields.scope: page | section | component | asset | campaign | global
fields.category: hero | pricing | feature | cta | testimonial | footer | navigation | email | ad | onboarding
fields.brand_archetype: e.g. luxury-editorial | playful-saaS | mythic-naturecore | tech-noir | data-driven-minimal
fields.visual_treatment: surface | depth | glass | grain | liquid | pixel | brutal | cinematic | botanical-shadow
fields.motion_style: micro-hover | scroll-reveal | physics-tilt | cinematic-pan | data-driven | none | staggered
fields.dependencies: array of prior section/component ids this depends on for copy or assets
fields.copy_slots: object map of slot_name -> { tone, length, proof_type, cta_variant }
fields.implementation_patterns: array of cluster or component patterns used (e.g. 'react-tailwind-bento', 'framer-motion-scroll')

agent_usage: Query cortex with {brand_archetype, scope, section_type, visual_treatment} to retrieve nearest on-brand refs before generation. Store every emitted artifact + decision with this schema for future rerank and allostatic setpoint moves.
